name: okx-rugshield-demo-scenarios
description: Demo and judging scenarios for OKX RugShield. Covers scout detection, guardian defense, dependency downgrade behavior, and auditable outputs.

scenarios.title: Scout detects a high-risk mock rug event

input.request: 回放一个 mock 风险事件并输出 Threat Report

expected.success_condition: A structured Threat Report is produced and recommends guardian follow-up when risk is high.

scenarios.title: Scout performs live signal check for OKB on xlayer

input.request: 扫描 OKB 在 xlayer 上的风险信号

expected.fallback_behavior: If official OKX skills or credentials are missing, explain that live mode is unavailable and downgrade to manual or mock analysis.

scenarios.title: Guardian creates a simulated staged exit plan

input.request: 根据 Threat Report 给我一个防守退出方案

expected.success_condition: Guardian outputs an auditable defense plan with staged actions and explicit execution conditions.

scenarios.title: Guardian checks real portfolio exposure when dependencies exist

input.request: 检查这个地址的多链风险暴露

expected.fallback_behavior: If live dependencies are unavailable, return a manual analysis template and clearly mark live portfolio check as not executed.

scenarios.title: System degrades gracefully when OKX upstream skills are missing

input.request: 在没有官方 OKX skills 的环境下运行 preflight 并继续 demo
input.command: npm run preflight && npm run demo

expected.success_condition: Preflight warns about missing upstream dependencies but the project remains demo-capable instead of hard-failing for all use cases.
